description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and a rectangular form. The front features four vertical doors, each equipped with a slim, dark handle, and two horizontal drawers at the base. The top surface of the cabinet is flat and currently supports three colorful storage boxes: one yellow, one green, and one red. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, with no visible openings or decorative elements. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or apartment hallways.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden cabinet with four doors, two drawers, and three colorful storage boxes on top. Modern, functional, and suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's depth and the three boxes on top, with the yellow box most prominent.
description_view_1: Front view displaying four doors with handles, two lower drawers, and all three boxes on the cabinet's top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the red box on top and the cabinet's solid side panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned back and the three boxes on top, with the yellow box now on the right.
